src: AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.
ja: Unity Engine向けAIスキル・MCPツール・CLI。完全なAI開発・テストループ。CLIで素早くセットアップ。効率的なトークン使用と高度なツール群。C#メソッドを1行でツール化可能。Claude Code・Gemini・Copilot・Cursorをはじめあらゆる環境で完全無料で動作。
